REQUEST_CHANGES: `service_routing.go:285` calls `catalog.Get`, and `service_catalog_cache.go:227-249` can return fresh or stale cached model IDs without a foreground `/v1/models` probe. That violates the per-dispatch dead-endpoint skip guarantee; a recently dead endpoint can still be selected until cache expiry/refresh.
BLOCK: AC7 needs a full regression run in an environment that permits localhost listeners. `go test ./...` failed here because `httptest.NewServer` cannot bind (`operation not permitted`), so no-regression cannot be evaluated from this review environment.
